headlines.headline: Crevex Labs secures $250M contract with an international consortium

sentiment.reasoning: Securing a $250M contract provides a clear, immediate, and durable revenue boost for Crevex Labs.

headlines.headline: Crevex Labs revises long-term strategy with focus on process automation

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
